name: Linear
description: Dark, ultra-minimal developer-tool aesthetic. Tight spacing, indigo accent, monospace touches. The reference point for modern issue-tracker UI.

name: Stripe
description: Light, high-trust palette with generous whitespace, gradient hero panels, and crisp typography. Sets the bar for fintech and developer-API marketing sites.

name: Notion
description: Light, content-first, block-based interface. Generous typography, emoji-friendly accents, and a warm neutral palette geared towards docs and knowledge work.

name: Vercel
description: Mono-chrome dark aesthetic with sharp geometric edges and Geist typography. The canonical look for modern frontend infrastructure.

name: Figma
description: Light, energetic palette with multi-colour accents and rounded UI. Designed to showcase the playful, multiplayer nature of design tooling.

name: Apple
description: Premium minimalism: full-bleed product photography, generous whitespace, San Francisco type, and restrained black-on-white hierarchy.

name: Adobe
description: Bold, creative aesthetic anchored by Adobe Red. High-contrast type, image-led sections, and dense product navigation typical of mature creative suites.

name: Asana
description: Friendly, warm palette led by coral and orange. Rounded shapes, illustrative hero art, and approachable copy aimed at non-technical teams.

name: Attio
description: Dark, minimal CRM aesthetic. Dense data tables, subtle gradients, and editorial typography aimed at modern revenue teams.

name: Monzo
description: Vibrant coral red on white with bold sans-serif headlines. Mobile-first banking aesthetic that reads as energetic and consumer-friendly.

name: Airbnb
description: Photography-led marketplace UI. Soft rosy red accent, rounded cards, and Cereal type. Optimised for browsing and booking.

name: Claude
description: Warm editorial aesthetic with beige and burnt-orange accents, serif headlines, and a deliberately literary tone. Calm and reflective for AI conversation.

name: IBM
description: Corporate enterprise aesthetic built on IBM Plex. Strict grid, blue accent, and dense informational layout aimed at B2B buyers.

name: Fey
description: Dark, premium investing-app aesthetic. Tight monospace data, neon accents, and editorial typography. Polished and product-led.

name: Uber
description: Black-and-white modernist aesthetic. Geometric type, full-bleed photography, and a deliberate absence of colour outside imagery.

name: Ramp
description: Calm, premium fintech aesthetic. Cream backgrounds, dark editorial type, and minimal use of colour. Confident and B2B-targeted.

name: Clay
description: Vivid gradient-led aesthetic with bold sans-serif headlines and animated illustrations. Energetic and product-forward for sales tooling.

name: Folk
description: Soft, light CRM aesthetic with pastel accents and friendly rounded UI. Approachable contact management for small teams.

name: Nike
description: High-impact, bold consumer ecommerce. Full-bleed photography, oversized type, and tight black-on-white grids built around product hero shots.

name: Wise
description: Green-on-white friendly fintech aesthetic. Bold sans-serif headlines, illustrative spot art, and a confident global-money tone.

name: Xero
description: Bright cyan-blue accent on white. Confident, professional accounting-software aesthetic with rounded UI and approachable type.

name: Cursor
description: Dark, minimal IDE-led aesthetic. Mono-spaced code surfaces, restrained accent colour, and a focus on motion in product demos.

name: PayPal
description: Trustworthy, navy-and-blue financial UI. Rounded shapes, friendly type, and a heritage palette that reads as established and consumer-friendly.

name: Bonsai
description: Soft greens and warm neutrals aimed at freelancers. Friendly type, approachable illustrations, and a calm productivity tone.

name: Contra
description: Vibrant pink-and-orange marketplace aesthetic for independent freelancers. Confident type, generous whitespace, and bold portrait photography.

name: Klarna
description: Soft pink palette with confident sans-serif and friendly photography. The poster child of buy-now-pay-later consumer fintech.

name: OpenAI
description: Restrained, editorial AI aesthetic. Mostly black-and-white with monospace accents, generous whitespace, and a research-publication feel.

name: Sentry
description: Dark, developer-focused aesthetic with deep purple accents and Rubik typography. Built around real product screenshots and observability data.

name: Google
description: Iconic primary-colour palette on white. Friendly, approachable consumer UI with Material-style components and generous touch targets.

name: Duolingo
description: Playful gamified aesthetic. Bright green accent, rounded illustrative mascot art, and friendly chunky type aimed at consumer learning.

name: Spotify
description: Dark consumer aesthetic with vivid green accent. Album-art-led layouts, bold display type, and a music-first content density.

name: Revolut
description: Premium dark fintech aesthetic. Crisp typography, neon accent moments, and editorial product photography. Confident global-finance tone.

name: Cash App
description: Bright lime-green payments aesthetic. Bold display type, expressive product photography, and a youth-coded mobile-first feel.

name: ClickUp
description: Vivid multi-colour productivity aesthetic. Pink-purple-blue gradients, dense feature lists, and an enthusiastic everything-app tone.

name: Netflix
description: Cinematic dark aesthetic. Iconic red accent, full-bleed key-art rows, and a content-first browsing experience.

name: Shopify
description: Confident green-on-light commerce aesthetic. Approachable display type, illustrative panels, and a small-business-friendly tone.

name: Zendesk
description: Warm, professional support-software aesthetic. Soft greens, conversational illustrations, and product-led marketing layouts.

name: Dropbox
description: Friendly cloud-storage aesthetic. Confident Sharp Grotesk type, indigo accents, and bold full-bleed colour panels.

name: PostHog
description: Playful product-analytics aesthetic with hedgehog mascot. Bright yellow on white, monospace product data, and an irreverent developer tone.

name: Webflow
description: Designer-targeted website-builder aesthetic. Cool blues, dense product UI screenshots, and confident editorial sections aimed at studios.

name: Airtable
description: Vivid red-orange accent on white. Spreadsheet-meets-database UI with dense colourful records, friendly type, and product-led marketing.

name: Coinbase
description: Crisp blue-on-white crypto aesthetic. Confident geometric Coinbase Sans, generous whitespace, and a regulated-finance tone.

name: Supabase
description: Dark developer-tool aesthetic with vivid Supabase-green accents. Mono-spaced code surfaces, dense docs, and an open-source community tone.

name: Dovetail
description: Vivid multi-colour user-research aesthetic. Soft pinks and purples, expressive illustrations, and a research-team-friendly tone.

name: DoorDash
description: Warm red-on-white delivery aesthetic. Photography-led food imagery, rounded UI, and a friendly local-merchant tone.

name: Intercom
description: Conversational support-software aesthetic. Cobalt-blue accent, illustrative messenger graphics, and confident product-led marketing.

name: Mercedes-Benz
description: Luxury automotive aesthetic. Black, silver, and editorial photography. Confident serif accents and a heritage premium-brand tone.

name: Mixpanel
description: Purple-led product-analytics aesthetic. Data-heavy hero charts, confident sans-serif type, and a B2B product-team tone.

name: Pinterest
description: Iconic masonry-grid visual-discovery aesthetic. Red accent, image-led UI, and a feed-first browsing experience.

name: WhatsApp
description: Friendly mobile-messaging aesthetic. Vivid teal-green accent, conversational chat-bubble UI, and a global-consumer tone.

name: Headspace
description: Warm, calming wellness aesthetic. Soft orange palette, friendly illustrative characters, and approachable rounded type.

name: Microsoft
description: Fluent enterprise aesthetic. Cobalt blue accent, Segoe-family typography, and product-tile-led navigation aimed at enterprise buyers.

name: ElevenLabs
description: Dark AI-voice aesthetic. Subtle gradients, mono-spaced code, and a research-tool tone for synthetic-voice tooling.

name: Salesforce
description: Enterprise CRM aesthetic. Cobalt-blue palette, dense feature navigation, and Lightning-style components aimed at large B2B buyers.

name: Customer.io
description: Crisp marketing-automation aesthetic. Cool blues on white, illustrative spot art, and product-screenshot-driven sections aimed at growth teams.

name: Perplexity
description: Dark AI-search aesthetic. Mint-teal accents, condensed editorial typography, and a clean answer-engine UI.
